title: OpticalMosaicRecipe
description:
Cloud-free optical mosaic from Landsat 4–9 and/or Sentinel-2. Optical sensors record reflected sunlight; cannot see through clouds, so cloudy pixels must be detected and replaced. Pipeline: collect scenes in season → mask clouds/shadows/snow per pixel → composite remaining clear pixels.

**Output values.** With `SR` correction, surface reflectance scaled to [0, 10000] (×100 of percent reflectance); without `SR`, top-of-atmosphere at the same scaling. Spectral indexes also ×10000 (NDVI in [-10000, 10000]).

Bands: common optical (`blue, green, red, nir, swir1, swir2`) + per-sensor extras (S2 red-edge, Landsat thermal) + metadata (`dayOfYear, daysFromTarget`). Spectral indexes (`ndvi, ndmi, evi, nbr, …`) requestable as outputs.

Cross-field constraints (date windows, SR/CALIBRATE exclusivity, cloud-method availability, multi-source-needs-CALIBRATE-and-ALL) live in companion rules.js.

aoi.description: Area of Interest. EE table or polygon — `ASSET_BOUNDS` not valid here. User must provide; no default.

scenes.description: Manual scene picks per scene-area, used only when `sceneSelectionOptions.type='SELECT'`. Keys are MGRS tile / WRS-2 path-row strings; values are scene-descriptor arrays. Leave `{}` for ALL mode. The LLM can't synthesize scene descriptors — choose ALL instead.

dates.title: OpticalMosaicDates
dates.description:
Seasonal model: target date + season window, optionally repeated across years.
- `targetDate` — what the mosaic represents. Scenes nearer this date get higher weight in MEDOID compositing and target-date-weighted ranking.
- `seasonStart` (inclusive), `seasonEnd` (exclusive) — half-open window each year. Full year 2024: `seasonStart='2024-01-01'`, `seasonEnd='2025-01-01'` (NOT `2024-12-31`). Wraparound allowed: `2024-12-01` → `2025-03-01` selects Dec–Feb. `seasonStart` ∈ [targetDate − 1y + 1d, targetDate]; `seasonEnd` ∈ [targetDate + 1d, targetDate + 1y].
- `yearsBefore` / `yearsAfter` — additional past/future years of same season. `yearsBefore=2, yearsAfter=0` with 2024 dry season → 2022, 2023, 2024.

**Coverage.** Earliest `targetDate` 1982-08-22 (Landsat-4). S2 only from 2015 — pre-2015 target with S2-only source produces empty mosaics silently. Future `targetDate` allowed (aspirational seasonal snapshot; late-season scenes missing if not yet acquired).

**Multi-year tradeoff.** Adding `yearsBefore`/`yearsAfter` fills gaps in cloudy regions but blurs temporal meaning (pixels may come from any included year). Sparingly for snapshots; freely (5–25y) for long-term composites over stable land cover.

type.description: Optional legacy mode tag. EE backend ignores; GUI strips on save. Don't set.

targetDate.description: Anchor date. ≥ 1982-08-22 (Landsat-4 launch). Future dates allowed.

seasonStart.description: Inclusive season start. Must be in [targetDate − 1y + 1d, targetDate]. For calendar-year mosaic, set to Jan 1 of `targetDate`'s year.

seasonEnd.description: Exclusive season end — set to day AFTER last covered day. Full year 2024 → `2025-01-01` (NOT `2024-12-31`). Must be in [targetDate + 1d, targetDate + 1y].

yearsBefore.description: Past years of same season to include. Default 0.

yearsAfter.description: Future years of same season to include. Default 0. Years beyond today contribute no scenes.

sources.title: OpticalMosaicSources
sources.description:
Satellite sources + scene-level cloud-cover prefilter.
- LANDSAT (30 m, 1982-onward, canonical for long-term studies; Tier 1 default, Tier 2 `_T2` variants are scenes that failed Tier 1 quality — add coverage at lower per-scene confidence).
- SENTINEL_2 (10 m, 2015+, 5-day revisit, sharper).

Combining both increases scene density at cross-sensor calibration cost: requires `compositeOptions.corrections` to include `CALIBRATE` and forces `sceneSelectionOptions.type='ALL'`.

cloudPercentageThreshold.description:
Max scene-level cloud cover (CLOUD_COVER for LS, CLOUDY_PIXEL_PERCENTAGE for S2 — producer's per-scene metadata estimate, not per-pixel). Scenes above are dropped before per-pixel masking.
- 100 — accept all; rely on per-pixel masking.
- 75 (default) — drop cloudiest, keep most.
- 25–50 — selective; for high-revisit regions where quality > coverage.
- 0–10 — only nearly-cloud-free; only abundant clear-acquisition regions.

dataSets.description: Source group → dataset ids. ≥1 group, ≥1 dataset within. Both groups → cross-sensor calibration required and manual scene selection disabled.

LANDSAT.description: Landsat missions. `LANDSAT_9` (2021+), `LANDSAT_8` (2013+), `LANDSAT_7` (1999+), `LANDSAT_TM` (4–5, 1982–2012). `_T2` = Tier 2 (lower per-scene confidence; extra coverage). Default `['LANDSAT_9','LANDSAT_8']`.

sceneSelectionOptions.title: OpticalMosaicSceneSelectionOptions
sceneSelectionOptions.description:
How scenes are chosen from the eligible pool.
- `ALL` (default) — every eligible scene; per-scene quality only filtered by `cloudPercentageThreshold`. Required when both source groups selected.
- `SELECT` — rank scenes per scene-area (MGRS tile or WRS-2 path-row), auto top-N or manual GUI pick. Single source group only; selections persisted in top-level `scenes`.

**LLM should virtually always choose ALL** — no useful way to populate `scenes`.

targetDateWeight.description: Trade-off when ranking scenes for `SELECT`. 0 = pure cloud-free (default), 0.5 = balanced, 1 = pure target-date proximity. No effect when `type='ALL'`.

compositeOptions.title: OpticalMosaicCompositeOptions
compositeOptions.description: Per-scene processing + per-pixel compositing. Groups: corrections (`corrections`, `brdfMultiplier`); S2 dedup (`orbitOverlap`, `tileOverlap`); per-pixel cloud masking (`includedCloudMasking` + per-method tuning + `cloudBuffer`); other masks (`snowMasking`, `holes`); per-scene quality filters (`filters`); per-pixel reduction (`compose`). Many fields conditional — see per-field and rules.js.

corrections.description:
Pre-compositing corrections.
- `SR` — Surface Reflectance (atmospheric correction; LS: USGS Collection 2 SR; S2: ESA L2A). Strongly recommended for any quantitative analysis (indexes, classification, regression). Default includes SR.
- `BRDF` — Bidirectional Reflectance Distribution Function. Removes view-angle-dependent variation, especially S2 east-west scene edges. Cheap on Landsat. **Expensive on Sentinel-2** — per-scene c-factor scales with scene count; can substantially extend retrieval time on large S2 mosaics. Keep on by default; consider dropping only for S2-heavy mosaics hitting compute limits and accepting visible orbit-edge banding.
- `CALIBRATE` — cross-sensor band calibration via TOA. Required for combined LS+S2 sources. **Mutually exclusive with `SR`** (CALIBRATE works on TOA; SEPAL doesn't derive calibrated SR).

Default `['SR','BRDF']` for single-source. Use `['BRDF','CALIBRATE']` for combined LS+S2.

brdfMultiplier.description: BRDF c-factor strength. 1 = textbook; 4 (default) = empirically flatter S2 mosaics; >10 over-corrects, visible color shifts. Used only when `corrections` includes `BRDF`.

filters.description: Per-scene quality filters that drop lowest-percentile scenes by score (after cloud masking). Default `[]`. Tightens the scene pool at coverage cost — sparingly, when result has too many low-quality contributors.

type.description:
Scoring axis.
- `SHADOW` — drop shadowiest scenes.
- `HAZE` — blue-band brightness. **Incompatible with `SR`** (atmosphere already removed).
- `NDVI` — drop lowest-vegetation scenes (catches missed cloud/haze in vegetated AOIs).
- `DAY_OF_YEAR` — drop scenes farthest from `targetDate`. Sharpens seasonality.

percentile.description: Threshold percentile. 0 = off; 50 (GUI default when adding) = drop worse half; 100 = keep only single best scene.

orbitOverlap.description:
S2 orbit overlap (adjacent relative orbits cover overlap strips at different look angles).
- `KEEP` (default) — both. Max scene density; subtle striping at orbit boundaries possible.
- `REMOVE` — one observation per overlap. Removes striping at cost of fewer obs per pixel.

Ignored without S2.

tileOverlap.description:
S2 MGRS tile overlap dedup.
- `KEEP` — both (overlap pixels processed twice; harmless, wasteful).
- `QUICK_REMOVE` (default) — fast geometry-based dedup; usually sufficient.
- `REMOVE` — exact per-pixel dedup; more expensive, more thorough.

Ignored without S2.

includedCloudMasking.description:
Per-pixel cloud-masking methods (masks unioned — pixel masked if any method flags it). Each method has its own tuning fields.

Availability:
- `sepalCloudScore` — universal.
- `landsatCFMask` — requires LANDSAT.
- `sentinel2CloudScorePlus` — requires S2.
- `sentinel2CloudProbability` — requires S2. Older; largely superseded by Cloud Score+; kept for backwards compat.
- `pino26` — requires S2 ONLY (no LS) AND no `SR`. Aggressive empirical TOA mask.

Default `['sepalCloudScore','landsatCFMask']`. For S2-only mosaics: `['sepalCloudScore','sentinel2CloudScorePlus']`. For LS+S2: include both sensor-specific.

sentinel2CloudProbabilityMaxCloudProbabi.description: Threshold for older S2 cloud-probability mask. Lower = more aggressive (more holes); higher = looser (more residual clouds). Default 65. Used only with `sentinel2CloudProbability`.

sentinel2CloudScorePlusBand.description: Cloud Score+ band. `cs` = raw clear-sky score; `cs_cdf` (default) = CDF-normalized, cross-region comparable. Use `cs` only when matching prior work.

sentinel2CloudScorePlusMaxCloudProbabili.description: Threshold (%) for Cloud Score+. Lower = more aggressive. Default 45. Used only with `sentinel2CloudScorePlus`.

landsatCFMaskCloudMasking.description: CFMask cloud-pixel aggressiveness. OFF keeps everything CFMask flagged as cloud; MODERATE (default) masks high-confidence cloud; AGGRESSIVE masks any flagged. Used only with `landsatCFMask`.

landsatCFMaskCloudShadowMasking.description: CFMask cloud-shadow aggressiveness. Default MODERATE. Used only with `landsatCFMask`.

landsatCFMaskCirrusMasking.description: CFMask cirrus aggressiveness (thin high cloud, cirrus-band only). Default MODERATE. Used only with `landsatCFMask`.

landsatCFMaskDilatedCloud.description: CFMask dilated-cloud edge buffer. `REMOVE` (default, conservative) drops it; `KEEP` retains buffer at cost of more cloud-edge contamination. Used only with `landsatCFMask`.

sepalCloudScoreMaxCloudProbability.description: Threshold for SEPAL cloud-score mask. Lower = more aggressive. Default 30. Used only with `sepalCloudScore`.

cloudBuffer.description:
Buffer (meters) around detected cloud pixels — cloud-pixel detectors miss edges; buffer dilates each detection.
- 0 (default) — no buffer.
- 120 — moderate (~4 S2/LS pixels). Reduces cloud-edge contamination.
- 600 — aggressive. Heavy cloud-affected scenes only; produces large holes.

**Cost warning.** Buffering is expensive — every cloud pixel triggers a morphological dilation per scene; cost grows with both buffer size and cloud fraction; on cloudy AOIs the larger options can dominate retrieval time. **Leave at 0 unless the user explicitly asks to mask cloud edges more aggressively, or you've already tried with no buffer and the user is unhappy with cloud-edge contamination.**

Discrete enum because the implementation accepts only these three.

holes.description:
Pixels with no clear observations.
- `ALLOW` (default) — leave masked (transparent in output). Right when downstream needs to know which pixels are reliable.
- `PREVENT` — fill by relaxing cloud mask in worst spots (lowest-quality observations accepted). Hole-free at cost of degraded quality where data scarce. Visual products / basemaps only.

snowMasking.description: `ON` (default) masks snow with clouds — right for most thematic mapping (snow rarely the target signal; confuses cloud detectors). `OFF` for snow/ice studies, cryosphere monitoring, or any analysis where snow is the signal.

compose.description:
Per-pixel reduction across surviving observations.
- `MEDOID` (default) — pick observation per pixel whose multi-band vector is closest to the temporal median. Preserves spectral integrity (no cross-band averaging) and per-pixel acquisition date. **Recommended for indexes, classification, regression.**
- `MEDIAN` — per-band median. Smoothes noise but breaks spectral integrity (different bands may come from different scenes' best estimates) and produces no per-pixel date. Visual products where smoothness > fidelity.

allOf.description: brdfMultiplier required when corrections includes BRDF.
Cloud Score+ tuning required when includedCloudMasking contains sentinel2CloudScorePlus.
Landsat CFMask tuning required when includedCloudMasking contains landsatCFMask.
sepalCloudScoreMaxCloudProbability required when includedCloudMasking contains sepalCloudScore.
